description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named cpack-builder that runs on pull requests, pushes, and a daily schedule. The workflow should read repository contents and use a bash shell. It should build CPack in a matrix of aarch64 and amd64 architectures using ubuntu-24.04-arm and ubuntu-24.04 runners respectively. The workflow checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Miniforge3 with a dev environment, and runs a bash script to build CPack.
